codeReview.summary: CrossChainQuoteEstimator now exposes execute/send/weighMessage and the feature adds local tests plus deployment artifacts, but two blocking gaps remain: the notifier never encodes liquidation payload into the XCM message, and the live execute proof does not use the required Polkadot docs sample message.

issues.description: notifyLiquidation always sends the hard-coded ClearOrigin message `0x05040a`, so borrower/debt/collateral are never encoded into the outgoing XCM payload. That misses the feature requirement to send liquidation data and contradicts the contract’s own SetTopic/topic comments.

The deployment proof executes a minimal ClearOrigin message first and only attempts the required Polkadot docs sample if that first call fails. Because ClearOrigin succeeds, the docs sample is never sent; `dualvm/deployments/polkadot-hub-testnet-xcm-full-integration.json` records `attempt2_docsSample.error = "not attempted"` and the canonical execute proof uses `XCM V5 ClearOrigin (0x05040a)` instead of the requested docs payload.

The local tests use `0x010100` as the sample destination even though the contract docs, retry script, and proof all require a VersionedLocation V5 destination like `0x050100`. Because the precompile is absent locally the tests still pass, but they document the wrong wire format for future callers.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The solidity-worker skill says features requiring live testnet deployment should return to the orchestrator/deployment-worker, but this feature’s worker performed the deployment itself. The skill/procedure and actual mission expectations are out of sync.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/solidity-worker/SKILL.md:85-90` says live deployment should be handled by deployment-worker; the handoff records `npx hardhat run scripts/deployXcmFullIntegration.ts`, `npx hardhat run scripts/retryXcmCalls.ts`, and `node scripts/deployNotifierDirect.mjs` as verification commands in `/home/kpa/.factory/missions/dc664f26-9086-4d9b-896d-ba8f3bde8d71/handoffs/2026-03-17T21-37-22-896Z__xcm-full-integration__d856ecd5-e4b6-43b1-ba56-13690c31a74f.json:31-43`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared XCM library note is missing the V5-specific destination/message encoding and PAS-funding requirement that the worker had to rediscover while making execute/send succeed on testnet.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/library/xcm-precompile.md:8-30` only documents interface surface, missing-precompile behavior, and a weighMessage proof; `dualvm/scripts/retryXcmCalls.ts:9-13,44-57,133-147` and the handoff discoveredIssues capture the missing operational knowledge (`0x05` V5 prefixes, `0x050100`, and funding the contract with PAS before executing WithdrawAsset-based XCM).

summary: Fail. The feature adds the new XCM wrappers and supporting tests/artifacts, but it does not meet two core requirements: the liquidation notifier never embeds liquidation data in the outbound XCM message, and the live execute proof never runs the required Polkadot docs sample payload.
